results.title: Fencing Market to Reach USD 52.3 Billion by 2036 Amid Rising Infrastructure Development and Growing Demand for Smart Security Solutions - TMR
results.description: The global fencing market is poised for sustained growth over the next decade, with industry revenues expected to increase from US$31.1 billion in 2025 to US$52.3 billion by 2036. According to the latest market analysis, the industry is projected to
